must_fix.title: AppConfig has mixed responsibilities: data + I/O + merge + view
must_fix.suggestion: Extract ConfigLoader for file discovery/reading/merging. AppConfig should be plain data.

must_fix.title: RawConfig duplicates field definitions from EmbeddingConfig/RerankConfig
must_fix.suggestion: Add compile-time or test-time check that Raw and final structs stay in sync.

should_fix.title: Config::load called 4 times independently in search.rs
should_fix.suggestion: Load once at top of each CLI handler and pass down.

should_fix.title: RerankConfig.provider is Option<String> instead of typed enum
should_fix.suggestion: Remove provider from RawRerankConfig since only Ollama is supported.

should_fix.title: No abstraction for config loading makes testing harder
should_fix.suggestion: Accept sources as parameter for testability.

should_fix.title: AppConfigView duplicates structure for masking
should_fix.suggestion: Use custom Serialize or MaskedField wrapper.

nice_to_have.title: IndexConfig with only languages feels premature
SearchConfig defaults lose discoverability from CLI help
EmbeddingError and RerankError have near-identical variants
